link.name: Link
link.description: Grants permission to share Application Signals resources with a monitoring account

batchdeleteinstrumentationconfigurations.name: BatchDeleteInstrumentationConfigurations
batchdeleteinstrumentationconfigurations.description: Grants permission to batch delete instrumentation configurations

batchgetservicelevelobjectivebudgetrepor.description: Grants permission to batch retrieve a service level objective budget report

batchupdateexclusionwindows.description: Grants permission to add or remove exclusion windows from Amazon CloudWatch SLOs

createinstrumentationconfiguration.name: CreateInstrumentationConfiguration
createinstrumentationconfiguration.description: Grants permission to create an instrumentation configuration for dynamic instrumentation

createservicelevelobjective.name: CreateServiceLevelObjective
createservicelevelobjective.description: Grants permission to create a service level objective

deletegroupingconfiguration.name: DeleteGroupingConfiguration
deletegroupingconfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete a grouping configuration

deleteinstrumentationconfiguration.name: DeleteInstrumentationConfiguration
deleteinstrumentationconfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete an instrumentation configuration

deleteservicelevelobjective.name: DeleteServiceLevelObjective
deleteservicelevelobjective.description: Grants permission to delete a service level objective

getinstrumentationconfiguration.name: GetInstrumentationConfiguration
getinstrumentationconfiguration.description: Grants permission to retrieve an instrumentation configuration

getinstrumentationconfigurationstatus.name: GetInstrumentationConfigurationStatus
getinstrumentationconfigurationstatus.description: Grants permission to retrieve the status history of an instrumentation configuration

getservice.name: GetService
getservice.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a service

getservicelevelobjective.name: GetServiceLevelObjective
getservicelevelobjective.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about service level objective

listauditfindings.name: ListAuditFindings
listauditfindings.description: Grants permission to list service auditing results

listentityevents.name: ListEntityEvents
listentityevents.description: Grants permission to list events for an entity

listgroupingattributedefinitions.name: ListGroupingAttributeDefinitions
listgroupingattributedefinitions.description: Grants permission to list grouping attribute configurations

listinstrumentationconfigurations.name: ListInstrumentationConfigurations
listinstrumentationconfigurations.description: Grants permission to list instrumentation configurations

listobservedentities.name: ListObservedEntities
listobservedentities.description: Grants permission to list entities associated with other entities

listservicedependencies.name: ListServiceDependencies
listservicedependencies.description: Grants permission to list service dependencies

listservicedependents.name: ListServiceDependents
listservicedependents.description: Grants permission to list service dependents

listservicelevelobjectiveexclusionwindow.name: ListServiceLevelObjectiveExclusionWindows
listservicelevelobjectiveexclusionwindow.description: Grants permission to list exclusion windows for an Amazon CloudWatch SLO

listservicelevelobjectives.name: ListServiceLevelObjectives
listservicelevelobjectives.description: Grants permission to list service level objectives

listserviceoperations.name: ListServiceOperations
listserviceoperations.description: Grants permission to list service operations

listservicestates.name: ListServiceStates
listservicestates.description: Grants permission to list service states

listtagsforresource.name: ListTagsForResource
listtagsforresource.description: Grants permission to list tags for an Amazon CloudWatch Application Signals resource

putgroupingconfiguration.name: PutGroupingConfiguration
putgroupingconfiguration.description: Grants permission to create or update a grouping configuration

reportinstrumentationconfigurationstatus.name: ReportInstrumentationConfigurationStatus
reportinstrumentationconfigurationstatus.description: Grants permission to report the status of instrumentation configurations

startdiscovery.description: Grants permission to enable CloudWatch discovery

tagresource.name: TagResource

untagresource.name: UntagResource
untagresource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from an Amazon CloudWatch Application Signals resource

updateservicelevelobjective.name: UpdateServiceLevelObjective
updateservicelevelobjective.description: Grants permission to update a service level objective
